# duplocloud_aws_asg_warm_pool (Resource)

`duplocloud_aws_asg_warm_pool` manages an AWS Auto Scaling Group warm pool in Duplo. A warm pool is a pool of pre-initialized EC2 instances that sits alongside an Auto Scaling group, ready to be placed into service when the group needs to scale out.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `asg_name` (String) The full name of the Auto Scaling Group (e.g. `duploservices-<tenant>-<shortname>`).
- `tenant_id` (String) The GUID of the tenant that owns the ASG.

### Optional

- `instance_reuse_policy` (Block List, Max: 1) Instance reuse policy for the warm pool. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--instance_reuse_policy))
- `max_group_prepared_capacity` (Number) Maximum number of instances that are allowed to be in the warm pool or in any state except `Terminated` for the Auto Scaling group. Use `-1` to leave the value unspecified (no maximum). Defaults to `-1`.
- `min_size` (Number) Minimum number of instances to maintain in the warm pool. Defaults to `0`.
- `pool_state` (String) Sets the instance state to transition to after the lifecycle actions are complete. One of `Stopped`, `Running`, or `Hibernated`. Defaults to `Stopped`.
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `instances` (List of Object) Instances currently in the warm pool. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instances))

<a id="nestedblock--instance_reuse_policy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instance_reuse_policy`

Optional:

- `reuse_on_scale_in` (Boolean) Whether instances in the warm pool can be returned to the warm pool on scale in. Defaults to `false`.


<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--instances"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instances`

Read-Only:

- `availability_zone` (String)
- `health_status` (String)
- `instance_id` (String)
- `instance_type` (String)
- `launch_template_id` (String)
- `launch_template_name` (String)
- `launch_template_version` (String)
- `lifecycle_state` (String)
- `protected_from_scale_in` (Boolean)
